author: dayi1000
title: Stale Import Binding Bug in JUDGMENT_DETECTORS + do_run_batches God Function
notes: Two issues. Issue 1 (stale import binding): technically correct — concerns.py line 20 does `from ... import JUDGMENT_DETECTORS` which captures frozenset at import time, becoming stale when register_detector() rebinds it. Real bug pattern but low practical impact since generic plugin registration happens during lang setup before concern generation runs. Issue 2 (do_run_batches god function): valid observation but duplicate of S023 (@jasonsutter87, submitted 23 min earlier) which covers the same function with more depth (22 params, 355 lines, 11 responsibilities). Parameter count claimed as 23 is actually 22.
